sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n42873" key="e)saplw=s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐσαπλῶς</orth>, perh. <sense id="n42873.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἁπλῶς</ref></xr>, dub. in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Diogenian.</author> </bibl> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Epicur.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.50</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
